summary: Iteration 38 - Special Offers, Menu Sorting & Capitalization Testing COMPLETE. Fixed Header menu bug where Contact was rendered outside the sorted array. All menu sorting, capitalization, and navigation features tested. Add to Cart functionality confirmed working. Offer badge/strike-off features present in code but need active offer configuration to display.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Header.jsx: Contact was rendered outside the sorted menu array - now included in sort
Fixed Header.jsx: PROGRAMS changed to 'Programs' (title case, not ALL CAPS)
Footer.jsx: Menu items correctly sorted by label.length (shortest to longest)
Footer.jsx: Programs section correctly sorts by title.length
SessionsSection.jsx: Offer badge logic properly checks session.offer_text AND expiry date
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Hero offer badge and strike-off pricing logic is correct
PageHeadersTab.jsx: Global Special Offer section with badge text, colors, expiry, presets
AdminPanel.jsx: Per-session offer fields (offer_price_aed/usd/inr, offer_text, offer_expiry)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All menu sorting and capitalization features are working. Offer badge/strike-off pricing features are implemented but no active offers are configured in the database. To test offers visually: set global_offer_text in admin Page Headers or set offer_text + offer prices per session.

header_menu_sorting.issue_found: Contact was rendered outside sorted array

homepage_sessions_offer_badge.code_review: isOfferActive() checks offer_text AND expiry date correctly

homepage_sessions_strikeoff_pricing.code_review: getOfferPrice() returns offer prices when set > 0

session_detail_strikeoff_pricing.code_review: Shows original price with line-through when offer price exists
